rationale: Educ. Code §45.082 governs school district sale of real property and revenue bonds. It contains no provisions related to homestead exemptions or property tax appraised value, so no conflict arises.
quote: The board of a district may sell real property owned by the district and issue revenue bonds payable from the proceeds of the sale subject to this section.
_note: No direct or indirect conflict identified. §45.082 addresses disposal of district real property, not taxation or homestead exemptions.
